items.title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
items.summary: About 68,000 homes in Brittany have been affected, with electricity unlikely to be fully restored until Wednesday night.

items.title: 7.4 Mil. Plant and Fungi Samples Have Been Digitized to ‘Democratize Knowledge’ and Save Species
items.summary: After a marathon effort to digitize each of the 7.4 million plant and fungi samples in its herbarium, the Royal Botanic Gardens Kew has said the result will help “democratize knowledge” while leveragi…
